## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up and discuss potential collaboration between Marcel's company (fwd.digital) and Carmel's company (Siit)](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company (fwd.digital) has grown significantly, reaching $3M ARR with 25 customers and 17 employees](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Siit is a modern service desk for IT and operations teams, competing with established players like Fresh Desk](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers content, distribution, and conversion strategies to help companies like Siit grow their online presence](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Carmel is interested in working with Marcel to improve Siit's website, generate inbound leads, and establish thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Company Update

  - [Left DeepGram in September, brought on a CTO co-founder](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Company has grown to $3M ARR, 25 customers, profitable](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [17 employees, 30 deals in pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Just announced the company publicly last week](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)

### Siit Overview

  - [Modern service desk for IT and operations teams](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Replacing tools like JIRA Help Desk and Zendesk](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [Using AI for smart workflows, collaboration, ticketing, and automated answers](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [$46K MRR, recently raised $5M seed funding](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [Goal: $1M ARR by end of next year](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Sales motion: Free trial → Demo → Close (20% win rate)](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [Very low churn rate (0.2%)](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)

### Marketing Needs for Siit

  - [Website revamp needed for messaging and positioning](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Focus on IT teams as primary entry point (land and expand strategy)](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Hired Fletch PMM for homepage messaging](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Need to generate inbound leads and establish trust/thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [No marketing efforts until now](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)

### fwd.digital's Approach

1.  Content:
    
      - [Editorial and programmatic content to increase "sellable surface area"](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
      - [Develop content clusters (e.g., HR-related content, IT terms)](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)

2.  Distribution:
    
      - [Build authority for founders/brand](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Become publishers and influencers](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

3.  Conversion:
    
      - [Develop high-value front-end offers](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)

### Link Building Strategy

  - [AI-powered outbound campaigns for content partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [Goal: Generate 20-25 high domain authority backlinks per month](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Improve site indexing and authority](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)

### Potential Content Ideas for Siit

  - [IT terms glossary](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [Templates for common IT processes](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [Device management content](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [Integration showcases](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to add Carmel to fwd.digital Slack and send Statement of Work (SOW)](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
  - [Carmel to review and confirm engagement details](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
  - [Potential kickoff next Monday with a discounted first month (one work stream)](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
  - [Full engagement to start in January, aligning with Siit's aggressive growth goals](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
  - [Carmel to make final decision on timing (immediate start vs. January 13th kickoff)](https://fathom.video/share/pDBUqpmivETaBcCcrv17U34rxrVqYU1J?tab=summary&timestamp=1723.0)
